# Issue #1: Basic UI Structure Implementation

## Objective
Implement the core UI structure following our minimal, invisible design principles.

## Requirements
1. Single screen scaffold
2. 3x2 grid layout for noise types
3. Each grid item should:
   - Use correct color from design spec
   - Show purpose text (Focus, Sleep, etc.)
   - Have subtle elevation when selected
4. Simple play/pause button centered below grid
5. Remove all:
   - Emoji backgrounds
   - Volume controls
   - Navigation arrows
   - Stop button
   - Animations except essential feedback

## Technical Notes
- Use Jetpack Compose Material3
- Maintain MVVM architecture
- No state changes for volume (using system volume)
- Minimize recompositions
- Ensure accessibility support

## Acceptance Criteria
1. UI matches design spec in DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.md
2. No unnecessary animations or decorations
3. Code compiles without warnings
4. App runs smoothly on physical device
5. Grid items are easily tappable
6. Clear visual feedback for selected state
7. Play/pause button clearly visible and functional

## Dependencies
None - this is the first implementation task

## Estimated Effort
Medium - requires significant UI changes but no complex logic
